question: Extend the `Book` class to include a parameterized constructor that accepts and initializes `title`, `author`, and `isbn` upon object creation. Demonstrate its usage.

test_cases.expected:
Title: The C++ Programming Language
Author: Bjarne Stroustrup
ISBN: 978-0321563842
Title: Effective C++
Author: Scott Meyers
ISBN: 978-0321334879

errors: Inefficient string parameter passing in constructor: parameters are passed by value, leading to an extra copy for lvalue arguments before being moved. For potentially large strings, passing by 'const std::string&' or using a 'pass-by-value-and-move' idiom more carefully is generally more robust for performance.
